data.description: BoJ's Governor Ueda: Uncertainty remains high over the global economy
BOJ’s Ueda notes moderate recovery in Japan’s economy, tempered by areas of weakness.
BoJ's Ueda: ETF selling plan has flexibility to stop if needed
BOJ’s Ueda commits to hiking policy rate in line with economic and inflation progress.
BOJ’s Ueda calls for open-minded assessment of economic outlook.
BOJ’s Ueda calls for vigilance on trade policies’ influence over financial markets, FX, and economic conditions.
BOJ’s Ueda highlights significant uncertainty over trade developments and international economic reactions.

data.title: BlueNord ASA delivers retention shares to Executive Management as part of scheme announced in 2022.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Oslo, Norway, BlueNord ASA released a stock exchange announcement about the initiation of a unique retention scheme for its Executive Management. This scheme was first introduced on September 19, 2022. The Company's top management will be the beneficiaries of this initiative.

data.title: International doctors visit Smartee HQ in Shanghai to discuss next-gen orthodontics. Specialized lectures for mandibular repositioning were a key part of the visit.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Shanghai, Smartee Denti-Technology welcomed a group of orthodontic experts from Europe and Asia to its headquarters and digital production sites. The event featured in-depth discussions on cutting-edge mandibular repositioning techniques, alongside practical clinical observations. This gathering aimed to foster knowledge exchange and collaboration among the visiting delegation, further enhancing the expertise in the field.

data.title: XRP price hits $3.03, -1.08% change, as Ripple president joins Senate Banking Committee. $25M RLUSD donation boosts sentiment.
data.description: XRP is currently being traded at $3.03, showing a decrease of 1.08%. The long-term sentiment toward XRP is positively impacted by recent regulatory advancements and a notable $25 million donation in RLUSD, despite facing short-term weakness.

data.title: Factor2 Energy raises US$9.1M for geothermal energy from geologically stored CO₂, led by At One Ventures.
data.description: A German company, Factor2 Energy based in Duisburg, revealed today the accomplishment of its seed funding cycle, securing $9.1 million from venture capital. The leading investor in this round was At One Ventures.

data.title: Ethereum's Fusaka hard fork set for Dec 3 with 12 EIPs to double gas limit & enhance performance.
data.description: Ethereum's main developers have reached a consensus to implement the Fusaka hard fork by December 3rd. This upgrade will introduce a total of 12 Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIPs) aimed at enhancing scalability, improving security, and reducing expenses within the Ethereum network.

data.title: Anteris Technologies Global Corp. postpones special stockholders meeting.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease compared to the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 6.7 million, a decrease of 500,000. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.2% in the last quarter, indicating positive progress. The government has credited various economic policies and initiatives for this positive change, stating that they will continue to focus on boosting employment and further strengthening the economy.

data.title: Ignitis Group maintained ‘BBB+’ credit rating by S&P Global Ratings, after annual review.
data.description: AB “Ignitis grupė” has announced that the international credit ratings agency, S&P Global Ratings, has conducted its annual review of the Group’s credit rating and has confirmed a ‘BBB+’ rating with a stable outlook.
German PPI August 2025 Report

data.title: BNB hits new 52-week high at $994 amid overbought RSI, suggesting consolidation in the future.
data.description: The price of Binance Coin (BNB) has surged to $994.11, signaling a new yearly high. The bullish trend continues despite the overbought RSI conditions, indicating a possibility of consolidation in the near future.

data.title: Bank of Canada urges regulators to establish stablecoin regulations to keep pace with changing finance landscape. Head of payments cited potential threats if action is not taken promptly. #Canada #Stablecoins
data.description: The head of payments at the central bank of Canada, Ron Morrow, has urged regulators to establish a framework for stablecoins to avoid being left behind. This call comes amid the growing popularity of stablecoins, which are cryptocurrencies pegged to assets like the US dollar. Morrow emphasized the importance of regulatory oversight in ensuring the stability and security of these digital assets. The central bank official's message underscores the need for swift action, as stablecoins continue to gain traction in the financial market. Regulators are urged to take necessary steps to address this evolving landscape to safeguard the integrity of the financial system.
Japan's LDP's Takaichi Says No Consumption Tax Cut in Policy Promise Due to Time Constraints
Peel Hunt No Longer Predicts Bank of England Will Cut Interest Rates in 2025; Foresees Two 25-Basis-Point Cuts in First Half of 2026

data.title: Tryngolza (olezarsen) approved in EU for FCS by Sobi and Ionis Pharmaceuticals, enhancing rare disease treatment.
data.description: A global biopharmaceutical company, Sobi® (STO: SOBI), in collaboration with Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc., have revealed the approval of Tryngolza® (olezarsen) in the European market. This marks a significant milestone in providing innovative treatments for patients with rare diseases. The approval of Tryngolza® signifies a major breakthrough in the healthcare industry.
